data.title: Altus Group (TSX: AIF) to pay $0.15 dividend per share for Q3 2025 on Oct 15, with record date as Sept 30.
data.description: Toronto-based Altus Group Limited, a top commercial real estate intelligence provider, disclosed approval from its Board of Directors for a cash dividend of $0.15 per common share for the third quarter ending September 30, 2025. The payment is scheduled for October 15, 2025, to common shareholders listed as of September 30, 2025.

data.title: Dollar General & Uber Eats team up, 14,000 locations added, customers can order essentials via app.
data.description: In San Francisco, Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) and Dollar General Corporation (NYSE: DG) have revealed a collaboration in which over 14,000 Dollar General and pOpshelf stores will be integrated into the Uber Eats network. Beginning immediately and gradually growing throughout the month, customers of DG and pOpshelf will have the option to easily order a wide range of cost-effective essentials, food, and trending items for delivery to their doorstep through Uber Eats, either on-demand or at a scheduled time. This initiative aims to enhance customer convenience and satisfaction.

data.title: SharkNinja (NYSE: SN) to join Canaccord Genuity 45th Annual Growth Conference in Boston, MA on August 12, 2025 at 4:30 PM ET. Webcast available.
data.description: SharkNinja, a leading global product design and technology firm listed as SN on the NYSE, will take part in the Canaccord Genuity 45th Annual Growth Conference in Boston, MA. The company will conduct a fireside chat starting at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, August 12, 2025. The event will be live-streamed and accessible for replay. The webcast link will be posted on the Investor Relations area.

data.title: Pottery Barn partners with Roller Rabbit for new home collaboration, expanding Roller Rabbit's popular home collections.
data.description: San Francisco-based Pottery Barn, a William-Sonoma brand traded on NYSE under WSM, revealed a home collaboration with fashion/lifestyle brand Roller Rabbit. This aligns with Roller Rabbit's successful collections with Pottery Barn Kids and Pottery Barn Teen. The partnership introduces Roller Rabbit for Pottery Barn, expanding their offerings in the sustainable home retail sector.

data.title: AAM's Q2 2025 financial results: Sales of $1.54B, Net income $39.3M, Adjusted EBITDA $202.2M. Outlook: Sales target $5.75-$5.95B, Adjusted EBITDA $695-$745M. Profits forecast FY25. More info: Click the link.
data.description: American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. reported its financial results for Q2 2025 with sales of $1.54 billion. Net income was $39.3 million, or 2.6% of sales, and Adjusted EBITDA was $202.2 million, or 13.2% of sales. Diluted earnings per share were $0.32. AAM targets sales between $5.75 - $5.95 billion and Adjusted EBITDA between $695 - $745 million for 2025. A conference call was scheduled to review the results, and non-GAAP financial measures like Adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow were highlighted. The company is focused on transitioning to support electric, hybrid, and internal combustion vehicles. Important factors affecting future performance include global economic conditions, customer demand, technological advancements, and environmental concerns. For the full story, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mammoth Energy Services reported Q2 operational results, with revenue of $16.4 million, net loss of $35.7 million, and adjusted EBITDA of -$2.8 million. The company executed transactions totaling $108.7 million and invested in rental services with a solid cash position of $127.3 million. Revenue breakdown: infrastructure services $5.4M, rental services $3.1M, sand proppant services $5.4M, accommodation services $1.8M, and drilling services $0.7M. Cash on hand as of June 30, 2025 was $127.3 million.
data.description: Mammoth Energy Services, Inc. reported financial results for Q2 2025. They executed strategic transactions like selling infrastructure subsidiaries for $108.7 million, buying small passenger aircraft, and selling hydraulic fracturing equipment for $15 million. Revenue from continuing operations was $16.4 million, net loss was $35.7 million, and adjusted EBITDA was ($2.8) million. Infrastructure Services revenue was $5.4 million, Rental Services revenue was $3.1 million, Sand Proppant Services revenue was $5.4 million, Accommodation Services revenue was $1.8 million, and Drilling Services revenue was $0.7 million. They had $127.3 million cash on hand and $75 million borrowing base. Total assets were $364.2 million and total liabilities were $96.1 million. The Company will host a conference call to discuss these results. Mammoth focuses on oil, gas, infrastructure, rental, sand proppant, accommodation, and drilling services. They emphasize future growth and potential challenges.

data.title: Legionnaires' Disease lawyers hold community meeting in Harlem to address outbreak. Location: Harlem, NY. (100 chars)
data.description: In Harlem, New York on August 7, 2025, a community gathering was organized by lawyers specializing in Legionnaires' disease at the Renaissance New York Harlem Hotel on 233 W. 125th St. The attendees mainly discussed legal matters concerning Legionnaires' disease. Key speakers at the event included prominent Legionnaires' disease attorneys Jory Lange.

data.title: Gartner Hype Cycle highlights AI agents and AI-ready data as top innovations in 2025.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, AI agents and AI-ready data are identified as the leading technologies on the 2025 Gartner Hype Cycle for Artificial Intelligence. These two advancements are experiencing rapid growth and are expected to make significant impact in the near future.

data.title: Quantum-Si to join UBS Precision Medicine Frontiers Summit, a major event in Branford, Connecticut.
data.description: A company based in Branford, Connecticut known as Quantum-Si has confirmed their participation in the upcoming UBS Precision Medicine Frontiers Summit. The event is set to host various industry leaders, researchers, and professionals to discuss advancements in precision medicine. Quantum-Si's involvement underscores their commitment to innovation in this field. This summit will bring together over 200 experts and thought leaders, highlighting key developments and opportunities within the precision medicine sector.

data.title: Silver Lake partners with Adam Fisher and Peter Rumbold to launch $400M digital infrastructure platform for data centers.
data.description: A digital infrastructure platform is being launched in Menlo Park, California and New York by Silver Lake, a prominent technology investment firm, along with Adam Fisher and Peter Rumbold from Commonwealth Asset Management. The platform will focus on acquiring strategically positioned powered land sites for data centers. It starts with an impressive $400 million in capital with the goal of building a global portfolio to cater to the rising need for data centers' essential resources.

data.title: Got Electric LLC ranked #1 in Maryland, D.C., Delaware, and West Virginia among electrical subcontractors by Solar Power World.
data.description: A company based in Ijamsville, Maryland, known as Got Electric LLC has achieved the top ranking in Maryland, Washington D.C., Delaware, and West Virginia among electrical subcontractors. The achievement was confirmed on August 8, 2025. This reputable company has been acknowledged by Solar Power World for an impressive 13 years in a row, solidifying its position as one of the leading solar contractors in the nation.

data.title: Bybit launches new Web3 platform, offering $200,000 in prizes, solidifying position as world's 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on August 8, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, has revealed a new development in Web3 infrastructure called Bybit Web3. Following a pause in operations in May for restructuring, the announcement signifies Bybit's continued presence and innovation in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Accel-KKR raises $1.9B fund, commits $350M to isolved's growth for organic initiatives and acquisitions.
data.description: A global technology-focused investment firm, Accel-KKR, has revealed the finalization of AKKR, which involves a commitment of $350 million in fresh capital to expedite isolved's advancement through organic initiatives and beneficial acquisitions. This fund aims to propel isolved's growth significantly. This announcement was made in Menlo Park, Calif., on August 8, 2025.

data.title: Life Time transforms former Concourse Athletic Club into Life Time Perimeter, 9th Atlanta-area club, with multi-million dollar renovation.
data.description: A major renovation project costing millions of dollars has been completed, offering a comprehensive health and wellness experience to both working professionals and families at a landmark location in Atlanta. As of August 8, 2025, Life Time (NYSE: LTH), a leading healthy lifestyle brand in the country, has expanded its footprint in the...

data.title: VerifyMe (NASDAQ: VRME) to report Q1 2025 financial results on August 13, 2025. Company provides brand protection & logistics solutions.
data.description: VerifyMe, Inc., a company based in Lake Mary, Florida, and traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol VRME, has revealed its latest offerings for brand owners. These include services focused on time and temperature sensitive logistics, as well as solutions for brand protection and enhancement. The company shared this information in a recent announcement and plans to disclose its financial results soon.

data.title: Jennmar acquires Weber Mining & Tunnelling SAS to bolster international presence in mining and tunneling.
data.description: Pittsburgh-based company Jennmar recently announced a new transaction on August 8, 2025, which aims to enhance and supplement their mining and tunneling customer solutions. This development involves a collaboration with Weber, known for their strong track record in research and development. Weber brings to the table a top-notch portfolio of resin and foam products designed for critical applications. The specific financial details of the transaction were not disclosed in the announcement, but it is expected to significantly boost Jennmar's offerings in the sector.

data.title: Brown Plus promotes Courtney Catlin, CPA, to Learning and Development Manager role on Aug 1, 2025 in Frederick, Md.
data.description: A prominent accounting and advisory firm based in Frederick, Md., Brown Plus, has recently promoted Courtney Catlin, CPA, to the position of Learning and Development Manager, starting from August 1, 2025. This role, which has been newly created within the organization, marks an exciting development for the firm.
Bank Of England Announced "A Clear" Choice To Lower Interest Rates

data.title: Dow Jones futures up, Trade Desk down 30% on earnings, Pinterest & Twilio also fall, live updates.
data.description: Today in the stock market, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase, signaling positive market movement. However, Trade Desk faced a significant decline of 30% following their earnings report. Additionally, both Pinterest and Twilio also suffered losses. The overall market trend appears to be mixed with specific companies facing challenges. These developments highlight the volatility and unpredictability of the current market conditions.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up with big earnings; Tesla stops Dojo; AppLovin, Robinhood signal buys despite market dip.
data.description: Stock futures experienced an increase fueled by strong earnings reports, with Tesla discontinuing its Dojo supercomputer project. On Thursday, AppLovin and Robinhood showed positive buy signals despite a market downturn. This development resulted in Dow Jones futures rising. These numbers indicate a promising outlook for investors.
